evals.prompt: LGD 관련 Slack/메일/Drive 자료를 보고 제안미팅용 데모 brief 만들어줘. 오래된 RAG 얘기랑 최근 콜센터 얘기 맥락 구분해줘.
evals.expected_output: Builds dossier, separates stale RAG context from current contact-center priority, and emits recommended brief with evidence map.

evals.prompt: 병원 고객 자료에서 restricted 데이터 여부와 외부 배포 가능성을 판단해서 demo opportunity 뽑아줘.
evals.expected_output: Scores security/privacy evidence, blocks unsupported external deploy assumptions, and recommends offline/sanitized demo brief.

evals.prompt: GitHub 이슈와 Drive RFP가 충돌하는데 뭐가 최신/권위 있는 요구사항인지 정리해줘.
evals.expected_output: Resolves contradictions using source authority and recency policy, preferring current RFP/customer decisions over internal GitHub notes where appropriate.
